creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
This might be the coolest thing to do in London at the moment🛸🎁Get 10% off with code LONDONBY10(when booking through the link in bio)

Welcome to Jeff Wayne’s The War of The Worlds @thewaroftheworldsimmersive immersive experience 

Step into a Martial Invasion with 24 extraordinary scenes, multi-sensory effects and virtual reality – all set to Jeff Wayne’s iconic music🌌

Expect cutting-edge technology, live actors effects, multiple holograms, scents and temperature simulations. Dive into immersive 360º virtual reality experiences and witness Martian Fighting Machines attacking Parliament

🥂Enjoy delicious food and drink, and mind-blowing cocktails in a themed bar before and after the experience, you can also get a copy your photos during the experience as a fun memory 

🎫Tickets from £41.00 (Group Bundle (5+ tickets) for £38.50 per person) 

 📅 Tickets are available including 2025
⏳ Duration: approx. 1 hour and 50 minutes (including a 20-minute interval)
📍The War of The Worlds immersive experience  56 Leadenhall Street, London, EC3A 2BJ

Ad

@fever_uk #FeverAmbassador #VRExperience #MartianInvasion

transcription.text: This might be the coolest thing to do in London at the moment. Welcome to Geoff Wayne's The War of the Worlds immersive experience. Step into a Martian invasion with 24 extraordinary scenes, multisensory effects and virtual reality. Expect cutting-edge technology with live actors, multiple holograms, scents and temperature simulations. Enjoy delicious food and cocktails in a themed bar and don't forget to get a copy of your photos after the experience. Use this promo code to get 10% off when booking through the link in bio. Tickets are available including 2025. This experience is located not far from Liverpool Street Station.
